---
title: "About This Website"
output: 
  html_document
---
  
| Week | M Date |    Topic              | Reading             | Slides             |  Assignments        | Video     | Misc.           |
|:----:|:------:|-----------------------|---------------------|--------------------|---------------------|-----------|-----------------|
| 01   | 03 Feb |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 02   | 10 Feb |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 03   | 17 Feb |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 04   | 24 Feb |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 05   | 02 Mar |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 06   | 09 Mar |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 07   | 16 Mar |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 08   | 30 Mar |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 09   | 06 Apr |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 10   | 13 Apr |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 11   | 20 Apr |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 12   | 27 Apr |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| 13   | 04 May |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
| Exam | xx May |                       |                     |                    |                     |           |                 |
